summary: Frontend-only end-to-end test of the reconfigured Data Center Impact Tracker single-page civic toolkit. All 12 modules, sidebar rail (12 module links + 2 external), scrollspy, 5 live calculators, 4 file downloads, comment drafter, survey CSV download, scripture <details> expansion, and Civic Election Tracker were verified. 27 functional checks executed; 27/27 features pass. The one nominally 'FAIL' assertion was an over-strict string match ('8.80' vs '8.8') in the Module 2 water calculator readout — the underlying functionality (slider updates onsite/indirect/total readouts AND the #b-dc bar width grows to 100%) is fully working.
critical_code_review_comments: app.js is well-scoped with IIFEs per module and uses guard clauses (if (!rDc) return) which is good practice for a single-page bundle.

Water calculator (Module 2) numeric readout uses fmt2 (maximumFractionDigits:2) so values like 8.8 render without trailing zero. Cosmetic only; consider toFixed(2) if uniform 2-decimal display is desired.
Sound module home-marker translation pins to x=290 (max) when dist=1000ft due to Math.min(380, 110 + (dist/1500)*270) ≈ 290; works correctly.
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes — excellent for automated regression.
External links (johnsoncitytn.org, GoVoteTN.gov) use target=_blank with rel=noopener — secure.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single-page app served from /app/frontend/public (index.html + app.js + styles.css). React App.js returns null intentionally. All 12 modules use data-testid=module-1..module-12; rail links use rail-m1..rail-m12. Five interactive calculators: tool-electric, tool-water, tool-sound, tool-air, tool-stranded. Four downloads via Blob: download-rtk, download-rtk-2, download-ordinance (.txt), download-comment (.txt), download-survey (.csv). No backend in use.
verified_features: Brand 'Data Center Impact Tracker' + hero title present
Clicking rail-m5 scrolls module-5 into view; scrollspy adds .active to current rail
Module 2: changing water-evap+water-season updates #o-onsite/#o-indirect/#o-total and #b-dc bar width grows to 100%
Module 3: changing sound-db+sound-dist updates #o-atHome dB readout, #o-health message, and #house translate-x
Module 5: cases-table has 5 jurisdiction rows with reason tags
Module 6: rtk-checklist has 8 checkboxes; download-rtk yields right-to-know-checklist.txt
Module 8: download-ordinance yields model-hyperscale-data-center-ordinance.txt; download-rtk-2 yields right-to-know-checklist.txt
Module 9: stranded sliders change #o-half (4.8yr→0.9yr) and risk class (Low→Severe)
Module 10: town-hall-calendar contains '1st Thursday', '3rd Thursday', 'Municipal' text
Module 10: comment-drafter populates comment-preview with name+hood multi-line text; download-comment yields public-comment-draft.txt
Module 10: survey-db slider updates #s-dbVal; download-survey yields .csv with header 'address,datetime,dBA,low_frequency_vibration,notes'
Module 11: scripture-1..scripture-4 <details> all expand on click
Module 12: election-august shows Aug 6 / Jul 7 / Jul 17–Aug 1, 2026; election-november shows Nov 3 / Oct 5 / Oct 14–Oct 29, 2026; govote-link href contains GoVoteTN.gov and target=_blank
Visual: .facts li uses grid 28px + 435px content — no one-word-per-line wrapping
